title: GMY Halogen G9 Oven Bulbs 40W 230V G9 Oven Lamp for Neff/Zanussi/Bosch/AEG Microwave Cooker Bulb Applications 300 Degree C Heat Tolerant Light Bulbs 4 Pack
features: Dimmable and instant on without any delay
Wide Applications: G9 40W OVEN BULBS are ideal for use in different kind of ovens, such as Neff/Zanussi/Bosch/AEG/Smeg/Hotpoint Oven and so on.
description: Product Description G9 HALOGEN OVEN BULB Heat Resistant Tolerant up to 300 degrees C Easy to install With the standard G9 base, oven bulbs are easy to mount on G9 light fixtures and sockets REMINDER Turn off the power before changing the G9 OVEN BULBS, and do not transfer skin oils by touching the glass bulb. Specifications Input Volt: 230V Wattage: 40W Lamp Base: G9 Beam Angle: 360° CCT: 2700K(Warm White) Lifespan: 1000 hours Product Size: 15*40mm Wide Applications G9 40W OVEN BULBS are ideal for use in different kind of ovens, such as Neff Oven, Zanussi Oven, Bosch Oven, AEG Oven, Smeg Oven, Hotpoint Oven, Cooker, Microwaves and so on. High Quality The g9 oven bulbs are made of high quality glass, instant ignition without any delay, tolerant up to 300 degrees C. Easy to install With the standard G9 base, oven bulbs are easy to mount on G9 light fixtures and sockets 360 ° Beam Angle With the full glass body, the oven bulbs can shine with a 360 ° beam angle
